overview: A clean, modern typing practice website with real-time feedback, multiple practice modes, and a premium slate-blue design. Supports paragraph practice with difficulty levels, chat simulation, and coding mode with multilingual (English + Hinglish) content.
features: Multiple typing modes: Paragraph (10 difficulty levels), Chat Simulation, Coding Mode
Real-time WPM and accuracy tracking with live mistake highlighting
Post-session results with error breakdown and performance timeline
Daily streak system and session history stored locally
Dark/light mode toggle with persistent preference
Slate blue premium design with smooth animations and rounded UI
Mobile-optimized: natural keyboard input, no viewport shift on mobile
